name: chinese-converter
title: Chinese Converter
description: Convert number input into Chinese formatted text, including uppercase RMB amount text.
author: tofrankie

commands.name: convert-number-to-rmb
commands.title: Convert Number to RMB
commands.description: Convert number to uppercase Chinese RMB text.

preferences.name: autoReadClipboard
preferences.title: Auto Read Clipboard
preferences.label: Read clipboard content and fill the search box on launch
preferences.description: When enabled, if no number is provided through the command argument, the command reads clipboard text on launch and converts it automatically.

preferences.name: roundingMode
preferences.title: Rounding Mode
preferences.description: How to handle   extra decimal digits beyond the specified places.

data.title: 四舍五入 / Round Half Up
五舍六入 / Round Half Down
向正无穷取整 / Round Ceil
向负无穷取整 / Round Floor
银行家舍入 / Round Half Even
半正无穷取整 / Round Half Ceil
半负无穷取整 / Round Half Floor

preferences.name: unOmitYuan
preferences.title: Always Show Yuan
preferences.label: 不足一元时也显示「元」，如零元叁角贰分
preferences.description: 不足一元时也显示「元」，如 0.32 → 零元叁角贰分。

preferences.name: preferTraditionalYuan
preferences.title: Use Traditional Yuan
preferences.label: 使用「圆」替代「元」
preferences.description: 开启后使用「圆」，默认使用「元」。

preferences.name: forceZheng
preferences.title: Append Zheng
preferences.label: 到角位（无分）时在末尾加「整」，如壹元贰角整
preferences.description: 到角位（无分）时在末尾加「整」，如 1.2 → 壹元贰角整。

preferences.name: preferSimpleZheng
preferences.title: Use Simple Zheng
preferences.label: 使用「正」替代「整」
preferences.description: 开启后使用「正」，默认使用「整」。

preferences.name: moneyPrefix
preferences.title: Custom Prefix
preferences.description: 在结果前添加自定义文字，如「人民币壹元贰角叁分」。
